summary: Iteration 91: Echo Concierge '+ New Ticket' button feature fully tested. All 9 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI fully functional - button visible, inline form works, ticket creation successful, Cancel toggle works.
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test tickets via POST /api/concierge/guest-report during testing. Tickets with title 'Test New Ticket Button' created with room 501, guest Jane Smith, category room, priority high.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 91 verified the '+ New Ticket' button feature in Echo Concierge panel. The button (data-testid='new-ticket-btn') is on the Tickets tab toolbar, styled with amber/gold accent. Clicking it reveals an inline form (data-testid='new-ticket-form') with fields: title (new-ticket-title), guest name (new-ticket-guest), room number (new-ticket-room), category dropdown (new-ticket-category), priority dropdown (new-ticket-priority), and Create Ticket button (submit-new-ticket). Form submits to POST /api/concierge/guest-report. Button toggles to 'Cancel' (red) when form is open. Echo Concierge panel is accessed via taskbar (data-testid='taskbar-echo-concierge') or toolbar (data-testid='toolbar-echo-concierge').

backend_api_tests: POST /api/concierge/guest-report - creates ticket with all fields (guest_name, room_number, category, priority, title, description)
POST /api/concierge/guest-report - creates ticket with minimal fields (only title required)
GET /api/concierge/tickets - returns list of tickets with total count
Create → GET verification - newly created ticket appears in list
Category validation - room, maintenance, restaurant categories work
Priority validation - critical, high, medium, low priorities work
frontend_tests: Echo Concierge panel opens from taskbar (data-testid='taskbar-echo-concierge')
'+ New Ticket' button visible on Tickets tab toolbar (data-testid='new-ticket-btn')
Button text shows '+ New Ticket' when form is closed
Form has title input (data-testid='new-ticket-title') - filled 'Test New Ticket Button'
Form has guest input (data-testid='new-ticket-guest') - filled 'Jane Smith'
New ticket appears in ticket list after creation
Button toggles to 'Cancel' (red) when form is open

new_ticket_button.details: Button visible on Tickets tab toolbar, styled with amber/gold accent, toggles between '+ New Ticket' and 'Cancel'

inline_form.details: Form slides open below toolbar with all required fields: title, guest name, room number, category dropdown, priority dropdown, description

ticket_creation.details: POST /api/concierge/guest-report creates ticket, form closes, ticket list refreshes showing new ticket

cancel_functionality.details: Button shows 'Cancel' (red) when form open, clicking closes form without submission
